-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Tracing
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-- | Trace events for TUI interface debugging.
data TUITrace
    = TUITrace_Initialized
    | TUITrace_AgentRegistered AgentId Text
    | TUITrace_AgentUnregistered AgentId
    | TUITrace_ConversationStarted ConversationId AgentId
    | TUITrace_ConversationPaused ConversationId
    | TUITrace_ConversationResumed ConversationId
    | TUITrace_ConversationEnded ConversationId
    | TUITrace_MessageSent ConversationId
    | TUITrace_LayoutChanged LayoutMode
    | TUITrace_MultiAgentConfigured
    | TUITrace_Error Text
    deriving (Show)

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Layout Configuration
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-- | Layout modes for the TUI display.
data LayoutMode
    = -- | Single agent view (default)
      SingleAgent
    | -- | Split screen vertically
      SplitVertical
    | -- | Split screen horizontally
      SplitHorizontal
    | -- | Grid with rows and columns
      GridLayout Int Int
    | -- | Tabbed interface for switching between agents
      Tabbed
    deriving (Show, Eq)

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Multi-Agent Coordination Types
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-- | Role definition for agents in multi-agent conversations.
data AgentRole
    = -- | Coordinates other agents
      AgentRole_Orchestrator
    | -- | Specialized agent with a specific role description
      AgentRole_Specialist Text
    | -- | General worker agent
      AgentRole_Worker
    | -- | Observes but doesn't initiate
      AgentRole_Observer
    deriving (Show, Eq)

-- | Configuration for an agent's role in multi-agent mode.
data AgentRoleConfig = AgentRoleConfig
    { arcAgentId :: AgentId
    , arcRole :: AgentRole
    , arcCanInitiate :: Bool
    -- ^ Whether this agent can start new conversations
    , arcSubscribesTo :: [AgentId]
    -- ^ Agents this agent listens to for messages
    }
    deriving (Show)

-- | Strategy for coordinating multiple agents.
data CoordinationStrategy
    = -- | Each agent takes turns
      CoordinationStrategy_RoundRobin
    | -- | One agent orchestrates others
      CoordinationStrategy_Hierarchical AgentId
    | -- | Agents collaborate freely
      CoordinationStrategy_Collaborative
    deriving (Show, Eq)

-- | Configuration for multi-agent conversations.
data MultiAgentConfig = MultiAgentConfig
    { maAgents :: [AgentRoleConfig]
    , maCoordinationStrategy :: CoordinationStrategy
    }
    deriving (Show)

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Agent Bus Types
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-- | Message type for inter-agent communication.
data MessageType
    = -- | Direct message to specific agent
      MessageType_Direct
    | -- | Message to all subscribed agents
      MessageType_Broadcast
    | -- | Response to a previous message
      MessageType_Response
    | -- | Request for action from another agent
      MessageType_Request
    deriving (Show, Eq)

-- | Message sent between agents.
data InterAgentMessage = InterAgentMessage
    { iamFrom :: AgentId
    , iamTo :: AgentId
    , iamType :: MessageType
    , iamContent :: Value
    }
    deriving (Show)

-- | Agent bus for inter-agent communication.
newtype AgentBus = AgentBus
    { busChannels :: TVar (Map AgentId (TQueue InterAgentMessage))
    }

-- | Create a new agent bus.
createAgentBus :: IO AgentBus
createAgentBus = do
    channels <- newTVarIO Map.empty
    pure $ AgentBus channels

-- | Send a message from one agent to another.
sendInterAgentMessage ::
    AgentBus ->
    -- | From agent
    AgentId ->
    -- | To agent
    AgentId ->
    -- | Message type
    MessageType ->
    -- | Content
    Value ->
    IO ()
sendInterAgentMessage bus fromAgent toAgent msgType content = do
    let message =
            InterAgentMessage
                { iamFrom = fromAgent
                , iamTo = toAgent
                , iamType = msgType
                , iamContent = content
                }

    -- Get or create channel for target agent
    channels <- readTVarIO (busChannels bus)
    case Map.lookup toAgent channels of
        Just queue -> atomically $ writeTQueue queue message
        Nothing -> pure () -- Target agent not listening, message dropped

-- | Broadcast a message to all subscribed agents.
broadcastMessage ::
    AgentBus ->
    -- | From agent
    AgentId ->
    -- | Content
    Value ->
    -- | List of target agents
    [AgentId] ->
    IO ()
broadcastMessage bus fromAgent content targets = do
    mapM_ (\toAgent -> sendInterAgentMessage bus fromAgent toAgent MessageType_Broadcast content) targets

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- TUI Events
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-- | Events emitted by the TUI interface.
data TUIEvent
    = TUIEvent_AgentStarted AgentId
    | TUIEvent_AgentStopped AgentId
    | TUIEvent_ConversationStarted ConversationId AgentId
    | TUIEvent_ConversationProgress ConversationId SessionProgress
    | TUIEvent_ConversationCompleted ConversationId
    | TUIEvent_ConversationFailed ConversationId Text
    | TUIEvent_MessageReceived ConversationId Text
    | TUIEvent_ToolCalled AgentId Text Value
    | TUIEvent_ToolCompleted AgentId Text Value
    | TUIEvent_InterAgentMessage InterAgentMessage
    | TUIEvent_LayoutChanged LayoutMode
    | TUIEvent_Error Text
    | TUIEvent_Shutdown
    deriving (Show)

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- TUI Interface Configuration
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-- | Configuration specific to TUI interface.
data TUIInterfaceConfig = TUIInterfaceConfig
    { tuiBaseConfig :: InterfaceConfig
    -- ^ Base interface configuration
    , tuiDefaultLayout :: LayoutMode
    -- ^ Default layout mode
    , tuiEnableMultiAgent :: Bool
    -- ^ Enable multi-agent coordination features
    , tuiMaxConversations :: Int
    -- ^ Maximum concurrent conversations per agent
    , tuiEnablePersistence :: Bool
    -- ^ Enable session persistence
    , tuiPersistencePath :: Maybe FilePath
    -- ^ Optional SQLite database path
    , tuiTracer :: Tracer IO TUITrace
    -- ^ Tracer for debugging
    }

-- | Default TUI interface configuration.
defaultTUIInterfaceConfig :: IO TUIInterfaceConfig
defaultTUIInterfaceConfig = do
    let tracer = Tracer $ \_ -> pure () -- silent by default
    pure $
        TUIInterfaceConfig
            { tuiBaseConfig = (defaultInterfaceConfig){ifcMode = ModeTUI}
            , tuiDefaultLayout = SingleAgent
            , tuiEnableMultiAgent = False
            , tuiMaxConversations = 5
            , tuiEnablePersistence = False
            , tuiPersistencePath = Nothing
            , tuiTracer = tracer
            }

-- | Operating mode.
data InterfaceMode = ModeTUI
    deriving (Show, Eq)

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Registered Agent
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-- | An agent registered with the TUI interface.
data RegisteredAgent = RegisteredAgent
    { regAgentId :: AgentId
    , regTree :: AgentTree.OSAgentTree
    , regNode :: AgentTree.OSAgentNode
    , regCreatedAt :: UTCTime
    , regConversations :: Set ConversationId
    }

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Conversation Handle
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-- | Status of a conversation.
data ConversationStatus
    = ConversationStatus_Active
    | ConversationStatus_WaitingForInput
    | ConversationStatus_Paused
    | ConversationStatus_Completed
    | ConversationStatus_Failed Text
    deriving (Show, Eq)

-- | Handle to a conversation within the interface.
data ConversationHandle = ConversationHandle
    { tchConversationId :: ConversationId
    , tchAgentId :: AgentId
    , tchSession :: TVar Session
    , tchStatus :: TVar ConversationStatus
    , tchAsync :: TVar (Maybe (Async ()))
    , tchMessageQueue :: TQueue (Maybe UserQuery)
    , tchCreatedAt :: UTCTime
    }

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- TUI Interface Handle
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-- | Handle for TUI-specific interface operations.
data TUIInterfaceHandle = TUIInterfaceHandle
    { tuiBaseHandle :: InterfaceHandle
    -- ^ Base interface handle
    , tuiLayout :: TVar LayoutMode
    -- ^ Current layout mode
    , tuiAgentBus :: Maybe AgentBus
    -- ^ Optional agent bus for multi-agent mode
    , tuiMultiAgentConfig :: TVar (Maybe MultiAgentConfig)
    -- ^ Multi-agent configuration if enabled
    , tuiRegisteredAgents :: TVar (Map AgentId RegisteredAgent)
    -- ^ Registered agents
    , tuiConversations :: TVar (Map ConversationId ConversationHandle)
    -- ^ Active conversations
    , tuiEventQueue :: TQueue TUIEvent
    -- ^ Event queue for subscribers
    , tuiPersistenceHandle :: Maybe PersistenceHandle
    -- ^ Optional persistence handle
    , tuiShutdown :: TVar Bool
    -- ^ Shutdown flag
    }

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Initialization
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-- | Initialize the TUI interface.
initTUIInterface :: TUIInterfaceConfig -> IO TUIInterfaceHandle
initTUIInterface config = do
    -- Initialize OS world with component stores
    world <- atomically $ do
        w <- OSWorld.newWorld
        w1 <- OSWorld.registerComponentStore w (Proxy :: Proxy AgentConfig)
        w2 <- OSWorld.registerComponentStore w1 (Proxy :: Proxy AgentState)
        pure w2

    -- Create base interface components
    shutdownVar <- newTVarIO False
    agentsVar <- newTVarIO Map.empty
    conversationsVar <- newTVarIO Map.empty
    eventQueue <- newTQueueIO

    let baseHandle =
            InterfaceHandle
                { ihOS = world
                , ihConfig = tuiBaseConfig config
                , ihEventSub = error "Use tuiEventQueue instead"
                , ihShutdown = shutdownVar
                , ihAgents = agentsVar
                , ihConversations = conversationsVar
                }

    -- Initialize persistence if enabled
    persistenceHandle <- case tuiPersistencePath config of
        Just path -> do
            handle <- OSPersistence.initSqlitePersistence path
            pure $ Just handle
        Nothing -> pure Nothing

    -- Create TUI-specific state
    layoutVar <- newTVarIO (tuiDefaultLayout config)
    registeredAgentsVar <- newTVarIO Map.empty
    conversationsVar' <- newTVarIO Map.empty
    multiAgentConfigVar <- newTVarIO Nothing

    -- Create agent bus if multi-agent is enabled
    agentBus <-
        if tuiEnableMultiAgent config
            then Just <$> createAgentBus
            else pure Nothing

    let tracer = tuiTracer config
    tracer.emit TUITrace_Initialized

    pure $
        TUIInterfaceHandle
            { tuiBaseHandle = baseHandle
            , tuiLayout = layoutVar
            , tuiAgentBus = agentBus
            , tuiMultiAgentConfig = multiAgentConfigVar
            , tuiRegisteredAgents = registeredAgentsVar
            , tuiConversations = conversationsVar'
            , tuiEventQueue = eventQueue
            , tuiPersistenceHandle = persistenceHandle
            , tuiShutdown = shutdownVar
            }

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Agent Management
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-- | Register a new agent with the TUI interface.
registerAgent :: TUIInterfaceHandle -> AgentTree.OSAgentTree -> IO AgentId
registerAgent handle tree = do
    let node = AgentTree.osTreeRoot tree
    let agentCfg = AgentTree.osNodeConfig node
    let tracer = tuiTracer (error "Tracer not available") -- TODO: fix

    -- Generate agent ID
    agentId <- newAgentId
    now <- getCurrentTime

    -- Create OS entity for agent
    let entityId = agentIdToEntityId agentId
    let world = ihOS (tuiBaseHandle handle)

    let osAgentConfig =
            AgentConfig
                { agentName = agentCfg.slug
                , agentModel =
                    ModelConfig
                        { modelFlavor = AgentTree.flavor agentCfg
                        , modelUrl = AgentTree.modelUrl agentCfg
                        , modelName = AgentTree.modelName agentCfg
                        , modelApiKeyId = AgentTree.apiKeyId agentCfg
                        }
                , agentSystemPrompt = Text.unlines $ AgentTree.systemPrompt agentCfg
                , agentToolboxBindings = []
                }

    let osAgentState =
            AgentState
                { agentStatus = AgentIdle
                , agentCurrentConversation = Nothing
                , agentCreatedAt = now
                }

    atomically $ do
        OSWorld.setComponent world entityId osAgentConfig
        OSWorld.setComponent world entityId osAgentState

    -- Register in handle
    let regAgent =
            RegisteredAgent
                { regAgentId = agentId
                , regTree = tree
                , regNode = node
                , regCreatedAt = now
                , regConversations = Set.empty
                }

    atomically $ modifyTVar' (tuiRegisteredAgents handle) $ Map.insert agentId regAgent

    -- Emit event
    atomically $ writeTQueue (tuiEventQueue handle) (TUIEvent_AgentStarted agentId)

    pure agentId

-- | Unregister an agent from the TUI interface.
unregisterAgent :: TUIInterfaceHandle -> AgentId -> IO ()
unregisterAgent handle agentId = do
    let world = ihOS (tuiBaseHandle handle)
    let entityId = agentIdToEntityId agentId

    -- End all conversations for this agent
    mRegAgent <- Map.lookup agentId <$> readTVarIO (tuiRegisteredAgents handle)
    case mRegAgent of
        Just regAgent -> do
            mapM_ (endConversation handle) (Set.toList $ regConversations regAgent)
        Nothing -> pure ()

    -- Remove from world
    atomically $ do
        OSWorld.removeComponent @AgentConfig world entityId
        OSWorld.removeComponent @AgentState world entityId

    -- Remove from handle
    atomically $ modifyTVar' (tuiRegisteredAgents handle) $ Map.delete agentId

    -- Emit event
    atomically $ writeTQueue (tuiEventQueue handle) (TUIEvent_AgentStopped agentId)

-- | Get all registered agents.
getRegisteredAgents :: TUIInterfaceHandle -> IO [(AgentId, RegisteredAgent)]
getRegisteredAgents handle = do
    Map.toList <$> readTVarIO (tuiRegisteredAgents handle)

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Layout Management
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-- | Set the current layout mode.
setLayoutMode :: TUIInterfaceHandle -> LayoutMode -> IO ()
setLayoutMode handle mode = do
    atomically $ writeTVar (tuiLayout handle) mode
    atomically $ writeTQueue (tuiEventQueue handle) (TUIEvent_LayoutChanged mode)

-- | Get the current layout mode.
getLayoutMode :: TUIInterfaceHandle -> IO LayoutMode
getLayoutMode handle =
    readTVarIO (tuiLayout handle)

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Multi-Agent Coordination
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-- | Configure multi-agent mode.
configureMultiAgent :: TUIInterfaceHandle -> MultiAgentConfig -> IO ()
configureMultiAgent handle config = do
    -- Validate that all configured agents are registered
    registered <- getRegisteredAgents handle
    let registeredIds = Set.fromList $ map fst registered
    let configuredIds = Set.fromList $ map arcAgentId (maAgents config)

    if configuredIds `Set.isSubsetOf` registeredIds
        then do
            atomically $ writeTVar (tuiMultiAgentConfig handle) (Just config)
            atomically $ writeTQueue (tuiEventQueue handle) TUITrace_MultiAgentConfigured
        else do
            error "configureMultiAgent: Some configured agents are not registered"

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Conversation Management
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-- | Start a new conversation with an agent.
startConversation ::
    TUIInterfaceHandle ->
    AgentId ->
    Text ->
    IO ConversationHandle
startConversation handle agentId initialMessage = do
    -- Verify agent is registered
    mRegAgent <- Map.lookup agentId <$> readTVarIO (tuiRegisteredAgents handle)
    regAgent <- case mRegAgent of
        Nothing -> error "Agent not registered"
        Just ra -> pure ra

    -- Create conversation
    convId <- newConversationId
    now <- getCurrentTime

    -- Create session
    session <- Session [] <$> newSessionId <*> pure Nothing <*> newTurnId
    sessionVar <- newTVarIO session
    statusVar <- newTVarIO ConversationStatus_WaitingForInput
    asyncVar <- newTVarIO Nothing
    msgQueue <- newTQueueIO

    let convHandle =
            ConversationHandle
                { tchConversationId = convId
                , tchAgentId = agentId
                , tchSession = sessionVar
                , tchStatus = statusVar
                , tchAsync = asyncVar
                , tchMessageQueue = msgQueue
                , tchCreatedAt = now
                }

    -- Register conversation
    atomically $ do
        modifyTVar' (tuiConversations handle) $ Map.insert convId convHandle
        modifyTVar' (tuiRegisteredAgents handle) $
            Map.adjust (\ra -> ra{regConversations = Set.insert convId (regConversations ra)}) agentId

    -- Start conversation thread if there's an initial message
    when (not $ Text.null initialMessage) $ do
        atomically $ writeTQueue msgQueue (Just $ UserQuery initialMessage)
        asyncHandle <- async $ runConversationThread handle convHandle regAgent
        atomically $ writeTVar asyncVar (Just asyncHandle)
        atomically $ writeTVar statusVar ConversationStatus_Active

    -- Emit event
    atomically $ writeTQueue (tuiEventQueue handle) (TUIEvent_ConversationStarted convId agentId)

    pure convHandle

-- | Run conversation in background thread.
runConversationThread :: TUIInterfaceHandle -> ConversationHandle -> RegisteredAgent -> IO ()
runConversationThread handle convHandle regAgent = do
    let node = regNode regAgent
    let agentCfg = AgentTree.osNodeConfig node
    let convId = tchConversationId convHandle

    -- Build agent (similar to OneShot)
    let mApiKey = Nothing -- TODO: Get from tree

    httpRuntime <- case mApiKey of
        Just apiKey -> HttpClient.newRuntime (HttpClient.BearerToken "")
        Nothing -> HttpClient.newRuntime HttpClient.NoToken

    let completionConfig =
            OpenAICompletionConfig
                { cfgTracer = Tracer $ \_ -> pure ()
                , cfgRuntime = httpRuntime
                , cfgBaseUrl = OpenAI.ApiBaseUrl $ AgentTree.modelUrl agentCfg
                , cfgModelName = AgentTree.modelName agentCfg
                , cfgModelFlavor = OpenAI.OpenAIv1
                }

    let completeF = mkOpenAICompletion completionConfig
    tools <- readTVarIO (AgentTree.osNodeTools node)
    let systemTools = map toSystemTool tools

    let tp = ToolPortal.makeToolPortal (Tracer $ \_ -> pure ()) (AgentTree.osNodeTools node)

    let agent =
            Agent
                { step = naiveTilNoToolCallStep
                , sysPrompt = pure $ SystemPrompt $ Text.unlines $ AgentTree.systemPrompt agentCfg
                , sysTools = pure systemTools
                , usrQuery = readTQueue (tchMessageQueue convHandle)
                , toolCall = executeLlmToolCall (Tracer $ \_ -> pure ()) (readTVarIO $ AgentTree.osNodeTools node) (SessionCompat.parseToolCallFromLlmToolCall, SessionCompat.callResultToUserToolResponse)
                , toolPortal = tp
                , complete = completeF
                , contextConfig = defaultContextConfig
                }

    -- Get initial session
    session0 <- readTVarIO (tchSession convHandle)

    -- Run conversation loop
    let loop session = do
            -- Check if paused
            status <- readTVarIO (tchStatus convHandle)
            case status of
                ConversationStatus_Paused -> do
                    threadDelay 100000 -- Wait 100ms and check again
                    loop session
                ConversationStatus_Active -> do
                    -- Run one step
                    result <- try $ run convId agent session
                    case result of
                        Left (e :: SomeException) -> do
                            let errMsg = Text.pack $ show e
                            atomically $ writeTVar (tchStatus convHandle) (ConversationStatus_Failed errMsg)
                            atomically $ writeTQueue (tuiEventQueue handle) (TUIEvent_ConversationFailed convId errMsg)
                        Right (llmTurn, newSession) -> do
                            atomically $ writeTVar (tchSession convHandle) newSession
                            atomically $ writeTQueue (tuiEventQueue handle) (TUIEvent_ConversationProgress convId (SessionUpdated newSession))

                            -- Check for user input
                            status' <- readTVarIO (tchStatus convHandle)
                            case status' of
                                ConversationStatus_WaitingForInput -> do
                                    mQuery <- atomically $ readTQueue (tchMessageQueue convHandle)
                                    case mQuery of
                                        Nothing -> pure () -- End conversation
                                        Just _ -> loop newSession
                                ConversationStatus_Active -> loop newSession
                                _ -> pure ()

                _ -> pure ()

    -- Start loop
    atomically $ writeTQueue (tuiEventQueue handle) (TUIEvent_ConversationProgress convId (SessionStarted session0))
    loop session0
    atomically $ writeTQueue (tuiEventQueue handle) (TUIEvent_ConversationCompleted convId)
  where
    toSystemTool :: ToolRegistration -> SessionTypes.SystemTool
    toSystemTool reg =
        let llmTool = reg.declareTool
         in SessionTypes.SystemTool $
                SessionTypes.V1 $
                    SessionTypes.SystemToolDefinitionV1
                        { name = llmTool.toolDescriptionName.getToolName
                        , llmName = llmTool.toolDescriptionName.getToolName
                        , description = llmTool.toolDescriptionText
                        , properties = llmTool.toolDescriptionParamProperties
                        , raw = Aeson.object []
                        }
    try :: IO a -> IO (Either SomeException a)
    try = Control.Exception.try

-- | Pause an active conversation.
pauseConversation :: TUIInterfaceHandle -> ConversationId -> IO ()
pauseConversation handle convId = do
    mConv <- Map.lookup convId <$> readTVarIO (tuiConversations handle)
    case mConv of
        Just conv -> do
            atomically $ writeTVar (tchStatus conv) ConversationStatus_Paused
            atomically $ writeTQueue (tuiEventQueue handle) (TUIEvent_ConversationPaused convId)
        Nothing -> pure ()

-- | Resume a paused conversation.
resumeConversation :: TUIInterfaceHandle -> ConversationId -> IO ()
resumeConversation handle convId = do
    mConv <- Map.lookup convId <$> readTVarIO (tuiConversations handle)
    case mConv of
        Just conv -> do
            atomically $ writeTVar (tchStatus conv) ConversationStatus_Active
            atomically $ writeTQueue (tuiEventQueue handle) (TUIEvent_ConversationResumed convId)
        Nothing -> pure ()

-- | End a conversation.
endConversation :: TUIInterfaceHandle -> ConversationId -> IO ()
endConversation handle convId = do
    mConv <- Map.lookup convId <$> readTVarIO (tuiConversations handle)
    case mConv of
        Just conv -> do
            -- Cancel async thread
            mAsync <- readTVarIO (tchAsync conv)
            case mAsync of
                Just asyncHandle -> cancel asyncHandle
                Nothing -> pure ()

            -- Signal end via message queue
            atomically $ writeTQueue (tchMessageQueue conv) Nothing

            -- Remove from conversations
            atomically $ modifyTVar' (tuiConversations handle) $ Map.delete convId

            -- Update agent's conversation set
            atomically $ modifyTVar' (tuiRegisteredAgents handle) $
                Map.adjust (\ra -> ra{regConversations = Set.delete convId (regConversations ra)}) (tchAgentId conv)

            atomically $ writeTQueue (tuiEventQueue handle) (TUIEvent_ConversationEnded convId)
        Nothing -> pure ()

-- | Send a message to a conversation.
sendMessageToConversation :: TUIInterfaceHandle -> ConversationId -> Text -> IO ()
sendMessageToConversation handle convId msg = do
    mConv <- Map.lookup convId <$> readTVarIO (tuiConversations handle)
    case mConv of
        Just conv -> do
            atomically $ writeTQueue (tchMessageQueue conv) (Just $ UserQuery msg)
            atomically $ writeTQueue (tuiEventQueue handle) (TUIEvent_MessageReceived convId msg)
        Nothing -> pure ()

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Event Subscription
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-- | Subscribe to TUI events.
subscribeToTUIEvents :: TUIInterfaceHandle -> IO (TQueue TUIEvent)
subscribeToTUIEvents handle = do
    -- For now, return the main event queue
    -- In a full implementation, this would create a new subscriber queue
    pure $ tuiEventQueue handle

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Server Loop
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-- | Run the TUI interface event loop.
runTUIInterface :: TUIInterfaceHandle -> IO ()
runTUIInterface handle = do
    -- Main event loop
    let loop = do
            shutdown <- readTVarIO (tuiShutdown handle)
            if shutdown
                then pure ()
                else do
                    -- Process events
                    event <- atomically $ readTQueue (tuiEventQueue handle)
                    handleTUIEvent handle event
                    loop
    loop

-- | Handle a TUI event.
handleTUIEvent :: TUIInterfaceHandle -> TUIEvent -> IO ()
handleTUIEvent _handle _event = do
    -- In a full implementation, this would dispatch to appropriate handlers
    -- For now, events are just consumed
    pure ()

-- | Shutdown the TUI interface.
shutdownTUIInterface :: TUIInterfaceHandle -> IO ()
shutdownTUIInterface handle = do
    atomically $ writeTVar (tuiShutdown handle) True
    atomically $ writeTQueue (tuiEventQueue handle) TUIEvent_Shutdown

    -- End all conversations
    conversations <- Map.keys <$> readTVarIO (tuiConversations handle)
    mapM_ (endConversation handle) conversations

    -- Close persistence
    case tuiPersistenceHandle handle of
        Just ph -> OSPersistence.closePersistence ph
        Nothing -> pure ()

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Utility Functions
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-- | Convert AgentId to EntityId.
agentIdToEntityId :: AgentId -> OS.EntityId
agentIdToEntityId (AgentId uuid) = OS.EntityId uuid

When writing Haskell code:

{"filepath": "src/System/Agents/OS/Interfaces/OneShot.hs", "content": "{-# LANGUAGE OverloadedRecordDot #-}
{-# LANGUAGE OverloadedStrings #-}
{-# LANGUAGE ScopedTypeVariables #-}

{- | OS-native OneShot interface implementation.

This module provides complete one-shot (batch) execution using OS-native
ECS primitives. It handles single-conversation execution with minimal
overhead and supports session persistence.

== Features

* ECS-based agent management with AgentConfig/AgentState components
* Progressive disclosure via agentEvaluateActiveTools
* Multiple persistence options (SessionStore, SQLite, file)
* Configurable timeouts
* Comprehensive tracing

== Example Usage

@
import System.Agents.OS.Interfaces.OneShot

-- Initialize interface
config <- defaultOneShotInterfaceConfig
handle <- initOneShotInterface config

-- Register an agent from an OSAgentTree
agentId <- registerOneShotAgent handle tree

-- Execute a query
result <- executeOneShot handle (Just agentId) "What is the capital of France?"
Text.putStrLn $ extractResultText result
@
-}
module System.Agents.OS.Interfaces.OneShot (
    -- * OneShot Interface Handle
    OneShotInterfaceHandle (..),
    OneShotInterfaceConfig (..),

    -- * Initialization
    initOneShotInterface,
    runOneShotInterface,
    shutdownOneShotInterface,

    -- * Agent Management
    registerOneShotAgent,
    unregisterOneShotAgent,

    -- * Execution
    OneShotResult (..),
    executeOneShot,
    executeOneShotWithSession,

    -- * Configuration
    OneShotPersistence (..),
    defaultOneShotInterfaceConfig,

    -- * Utility
    extractResultText,
    isOneShotSuccess,

    -- * Tracing
    OneShotTrace (..),
) where

import Control.Concurrent.Async (Async, async, cancel, wait)
import Control.Concurrent.STM (STM, TVar, atomically, modifyTVar', newTQueueIO, newTVarIO, readTVarIO, writeTVar)
import Control.Exception (SomeException, bracket, catch, throwIO, try)
import Control.Monad (void, when)
import Data.Map.Strict (Map)
import qualified Data.Map.Strict as Map
import Data.Maybe (fromMaybe, isJust)
import Data.Text (Text)
import qualified Data.Text as Text
import qualified Data.Text.IO as TextIO
import Data.Time (UTCTime, diffUTCTime, getCurrentTime)
import Prod.Tracer (Tracer (..), contramap)
import System.IO (stderr)
import System.Timeout (timeout)

import qualified System.Agents.AgentTree as AgentTree
import System.Agents.Base (AgentId, ConversationId, newAgentId, newConversationId)
import qualified System.Agents.HttpClient as HttpClient
import qualified System.Agents.LLMs.OpenAI as OpenAI
import System.Agents.OS.Core (AgentConfig (..), AgentState (..), AgentStatus (..), ModelConfig (..), World)
import qualified System.Agents.OS.Core.Types as OS
import qualified System.Agents.OS.Core.World as OSWorld
import System.Agents.OS.Interfaces (InterfaceConfig (..), InterfaceHandle (..), InterfaceMode (..), defaultInterfaceConfig)
import System.Agents.OS.Persistence (PersistenceHandle)
import qualified System.Agents.OS.Persistence as OSPersistence
import System.Agents.Session.Base (
    Agent (..),
    LlmResponse (..),
    LlmTurnContent (..),
    OnSessionProgress,
    Session (..),
    SessionProgress (..),
    SystemPrompt (..),
    UserQuery (..),
    defaultContextConfig,
    ignoreSessionProgress,
 )
import qualified System.Agents.Session.Compat as SessionCompat
import System.Agents.Session.Loop (run)
import System.Agents.Session.OpenAI (OpenAICompletionConfig (..), mkOpenAICompletion)
import System.Agents.Session.Step (naiveTilNoToolCallStep)
import System.Agents.Session.Types (newSessionId, newTurnId)
import qualified System.Agents.Session.Types as SessionTypes
import System.Agents.SessionStore (SessionStore)
import qualified System.Agents.SessionStore as SessionStore
import qualified System.Agents.ToolPortal as ToolPortal
import System.Agents.ToolRegistration (ToolRegistration (..))
import qualified System.Agents.ToolRegistration as ToolRegistration
import System.Agents.Tools.ExecuteToolCall (executeLlmToolCall)
import System.Agents.ToolSchema (ParamProperty (..), ParamType (..), ToolDescription (..), ToolName (..))

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Tracing
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-- | Trace events for OneShot interface debugging.
data OneShotTrace
    = OneShotTrace_Initialized
    | OneShotTrace_AgentRegistered AgentId Text
    | OneShotTrace_ExecutionStarted ConversationId AgentId
    | OneShotTrace_ExecutionCompleted ConversationId Bool (Maybe Text)
    | OneShotTrace_SessionPersisted ConversationId
    | OneShotTrace_Timeout ConversationId Int
    | OneShotTrace_Error Text
    deriving (Show)

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Persistence Configuration
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-- | Persistence configuration for OneShot execution.
data OneShotPersistence
    = -- | No session persistence
      Persistence_None
    | -- | Persist to SessionStore
      Persistence_SessionStore SessionStore
    | -- | Persist to file path
      Persistence_FilePath FilePath
    | -- | Persist to SQLite database
      Persistence_Sqlite FilePath
    | -- | Persist to both SessionStore and file
      Persistence_Both SessionStore FilePath
    deriving (Show)

-- | Manual Eq instance for OneShotPersistence (SessionStore doesn't have Eq).
instance Eq OneShotPersistence where
    Persistence_None == Persistence_None = True
    Persistence_SessionStore _ == Persistence_SessionStore _ = True
    Persistence_FilePath p1 == Persistence_FilePath p2 = p1 == p2
    Persistence_Sqlite p1 == Persistence_Sqlite p2 = p1 == p2
    Persistence_Both _ p1 == Persistence_Both _ p2 = p1 == p2
    _ == _ = False

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- OneShot Interface Configuration
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-- | Configuration specific to OneShot interface.
data OneShotInterfaceConfig = OneShotInterfaceConfig
    { oscBaseConfig :: InterfaceConfig
    -- ^ Base interface configuration
    , oscPersistence :: OneShotPersistence
    -- ^ Session persistence configuration
    , oscEnableThinking :: Bool
    -- ^ Whether to capture thinking output
    , oscTimeoutSeconds :: Maybe Int
    -- ^ Optional timeout for execution
    , oscTracer :: Tracer IO OneShotTrace
    -- ^ Tracer for debugging
    }

-- | Default OneShot interface configuration.
defaultOneShotInterfaceConfig :: IO OneShotInterfaceConfig
defaultOneShotInterfaceConfig = do
    let tracer = Tracer $ \_ -> pure () -- silent by default
    pure $
        OneShotInterfaceConfig
            { oscBaseConfig = (defaultInterfaceConfig){ifcMode = ModeOneShot}
            , oscPersistence = Persistence_None
            , oscEnableThinking = False
            , oscTimeoutSeconds = Nothing
            , oscTracer = tracer
            }

-- | Operating mode.
data InterfaceMode = ModeOneShot
    deriving (Show, Eq)

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- OneShot Result
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-- | Result of a OneShot execution.
data OneShotResult = OneShotResult
    { osrText :: Text
    -- ^ Response text from the agent
    , osrThinking :: Maybe Text
    -- ^ Thinking/reasoning content if captured
    , osrSession :: Maybe Session
    -- ^ Final session state if persistence enabled
    , osrSuccess :: Bool
    -- ^ Whether execution completed successfully
    , osrError :: Maybe Text
    -- ^ Error message if failed
    , osrExecutionTime :: Maybe Double
    -- ^ Execution time in seconds
    }
    deriving (Show)

-- | Extract just the result text from a OneShotResult.
extractResultText :: OneShotResult -> Text
extractResultText = osrText

-- | Check if OneShot execution succeeded.
isOneShotSuccess :: OneShotResult -> Bool
isOneShotSuccess = osrSuccess

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Registered Agent
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-- | An agent registered with the OneShot interface.
data RegisteredAgent = RegisteredAgent
    { regAgentId :: AgentId
    , regTree :: AgentTree.OSAgentTree
    , regNode :: AgentTree.OSAgentNode
    , regCreatedAt :: UTCTime
    }

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- OneShot Interface Handle
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-- | Handle for OneShot-specific interface operations.
data OneShotInterfaceHandle = OneShotInterfaceHandle
    { oscBaseHandle :: InterfaceHandle
    -- ^ Base interface handle
    , oscConfig :: OneShotInterfaceConfig
    -- ^ OneShot-specific configuration
    , oscRegisteredAgents :: TVar (Map AgentId RegisteredAgent)
    -- ^ Map of registered agents
    , oscExecutionAsync :: TVar (Maybe (Async OneShotResult))
    -- ^ Current execution async if running
    , oscPersistenceHandle :: Maybe PersistenceHandle
    -- ^ Optional persistence handle
    }

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Initialization
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-- | Initialize the OneShot interface.
initOneShotInterface :: OneShotInterfaceConfig -> IO OneShotInterfaceHandle
initOneShotInterface config = do
    -- Initialize OS world with component stores
    world <- atomically $ do
        w <- OSWorld.newWorld
        -- Register required component stores
        w1 <- OSWorld.registerComponentStore w (Proxy :: Proxy AgentConfig)
        w2 <- OSWorld.registerComponentStore w1 (Proxy :: Proxy AgentState)
        pure w2

    -- Create base interface components
    shutdownVar <- newTVarIO False
    agentsVar <- newTVarIO Map.empty
    conversationsVar <- newTVarIO Map.empty
    eventQueue <- newTQueueIO

    let baseHandle =
            InterfaceHandle
                { ihOS = world
                , ihConfig = oscBaseConfig config
                , ihEventSub = eventQueue
                , ihShutdown = shutdownVar
                , ihAgents = agentsVar
                , ihConversations = conversationsVar
                }

    -- Initialize persistence if configured
    persistenceHandle <- case oscPersistence config of
        Persistence_Sqlite path -> do
            handle <- OSPersistence.initSqlitePersistence path
            pure $ Just handle
        Persistence_Both _ path -> do
            handle <- OSPersistence.initSqlitePersistence path
            pure $ Just handle
        _ -> pure Nothing

    -- Create agent registry
    agentsMap <- newTVarIO Map.empty
    executionVar <- newTVarIO Nothing

    -- Log initialization
    let tracer = oscTracer config
    tracer.emit OneShotTrace_Initialized

    pure $
        OneShotInterfaceHandle
            { oscBaseHandle = baseHandle
            , oscConfig = config
            , oscRegisteredAgents = agentsMap
            , oscExecutionAsync = executionVar
            , oscPersistenceHandle = persistenceHandle
            }

-- | Run the OneShot interface (minimal for batch mode).
runOneShotInterface :: OneShotInterfaceHandle -> IO ()
runOneShotInterface _handle = do
    -- OneShot interface doesn't need a running event loop
    -- Execution happens synchronously in executeOneShot
    pure ()

-- | Shutdown the OneShot interface.
shutdownOneShotInterface :: OneShotInterfaceHandle -> IO ()
shutdownOneShotInterface handle = do
    -- Cancel any running execution
    mAsync <- readTVarIO (oscExecutionAsync handle)
    case mAsync of
        Just asyncHandle -> cancel asyncHandle
        Nothing -> pure ()

    -- Shutdown persistence
    case oscPersistenceHandle handle of
        Just ph -> OSPersistence.closePersistence ph
        Nothing -> pure ()

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Agent Registration
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-- | Register an agent for OneShot execution.
registerOneShotAgent ::
    OneShotInterfaceHandle ->
    AgentTree.OSAgentTree ->
    IO AgentId
registerOneShotAgent handle tree = do
    let node = AgentTree.osTreeRoot tree
    let agentCfg = AgentTree.osNodeConfig node
    let tracer = oscTracer (oscConfig handle)

    -- Generate agent ID
    agentId <- newAgentId
    now <- getCurrentTime

    -- Create OS entity for agent
    let entityId = agentIdToEntityId agentId
    let world = ihOS (oscBaseHandle handle)

    -- Create agent config component
    let osAgentConfig =
            AgentConfig
                { agentName = agentCfg.slug
                , agentModel =
                    ModelConfig
                        { modelFlavor = AgentTree.flavor agentCfg
                        , modelUrl = AgentTree.modelUrl agentCfg
                        , modelName = AgentTree.modelName agentCfg
                        , modelApiKeyId = AgentTree.apiKeyId agentCfg
                        }
                , agentSystemPrompt = Text.unlines $ AgentTree.systemPrompt agentCfg
                , agentToolboxBindings = [] -- TODO: populate from tree
                }

    -- Create agent state component
    let osAgentState =
            AgentState
                { agentStatus = AgentIdle
                , agentCurrentConversation = Nothing
                , agentCreatedAt = now
                }

    -- Store components in world
    atomically $ do
        OSWorld.setComponent world entityId osAgentConfig
        OSWorld.setComponent world entityId osAgentState

    -- Register in handle
    let regAgent =
            RegisteredAgent
                { regAgentId = agentId
                , regTree = tree
                , regNode = node
                , regCreatedAt = now
                }

    atomically $ modifyTVar' (oscRegisteredAgents handle) $ Map.insert agentId regAgent

    -- Log registration
    tracer.emit $ OneShotTrace_AgentRegistered agentId agentCfg.slug

    pure agentId

-- | Unregister an agent.
unregisterOneShotAgent :: OneShotInterfaceHandle -> AgentId -> IO ()
unregisterOneShotAgent handle agentId = do
    let world = ihOS (oscBaseHandle handle)
    let entityId = agentIdToEntityId agentId

    -- Remove from world
    atomically $ do
        OSWorld.removeComponent @AgentConfig world entityId
        OSWorld.removeComponent @AgentState world entityId

    -- Remove from handle
    atomically $ modifyTVar' (oscRegisteredAgents handle) $ Map.delete agentId

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Execution
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

{- | Execute a one-shot conversation with an agent.

This is the main entry point for OneShot execution. It:
1. Gets or creates the agent
2. Executes the conversation
3. Returns the result with optional persistence
-}
executeOneShot ::
    OneShotInterfaceHandle ->
    -- | Agent identifier (or use first registered if Nothing)
    Maybe AgentId ->
    -- | User query
    Text ->
    -- | Result
    IO OneShotResult
executeOneShot handle mAgentId query = do
    -- Create new session
    session <- Session [] <$> newSessionId <*> pure Nothing <*> newTurnId
    executeOneShotWithSession handle mAgentId session query

{- | Execute a one-shot conversation with an existing session.

This allows resuming from a previous session.
-}
executeOneShotWithSession ::
    OneShotInterfaceHandle ->
    -- | Agent identifier (or use first registered if Nothing)
    Maybe AgentId ->
    -- | Initial session
    Session ->
    -- | User query
    Text ->
    -- | Result
    IO OneShotResult
executeOneShotWithSession handle mAgentId session query = do
    let config = oscConfig handle
    let tracer = oscTracer config

    -- Get agent
    agentId <- case mAgentId of
        Just aid -> pure aid
        Nothing -> do
            agents <- readTVarIO (oscRegisteredAgents handle)
            case Map.keys agents of
                [] -> error "No agents registered"
                (aid : _) -> pure aid

    -- Look up registered agent
    mRegAgent <- Map.lookup agentId <$> readTVarIO (oscRegisteredAgents handle)
    regAgent <- case mRegAgent of
        Nothing -> error "Agent not found"
        Just ra -> pure ra

    -- Generate conversation ID
    convId <- newConversationId
    tracer.emit $ OneShotTrace_ExecutionStarted convId agentId

    -- Track execution time
    startTime <- getCurrentTime

    -- Run execution with optional timeout
    let timeoutMicros = fmap (* 1_000_000) (oscTimeoutSeconds config)

    -- Create async execution
    asyncHandle <- async $ do
        result <- runOneShotExecution handle regAgent convId session query
        endTime <- getCurrentTime
        let execTime = realToFrac $ diffUTCTime endTime startTime
        pure $ result{osrExecutionTime = Just execTime}

    -- Store async handle
    atomically $ writeTVar (oscExecutionAsync handle) (Just asyncHandle)

    -- Wait for result with timeout
    mResult <- case timeoutMicros of
        Nothing -> Just <$> wait asyncHandle
        Just micros -> timeout micros (wait asyncHandle)

    -- Clear async handle
    atomically $ writeTVar (oscExecutionAsync handle) Nothing

    case mResult of
        Nothing -> do
            cancel asyncHandle
            tracer.emit $ OneShotTrace_Timeout convId (fromMaybe 0 $ oscTimeoutSeconds config)
            pure $
                OneShotResult
                    { osrText = ""
                    , osrThinking = Nothing
                    , osrSession = Just session
                    , osrSuccess = False
                    , osrError = Just "Execution timeout"
                    , osrExecutionTime = Nothing
                    }
        Just result -> do
            tracer.emit $ OneShotTrace_ExecutionCompleted convId (osrSuccess result) (osrError result)
            pure result

-- | Run the actual OneShot execution.
runOneShotExecution ::
    OneShotInterfaceHandle ->
    RegisteredAgent ->
    ConversationId ->
    Session ->
    Text ->
    IO OneShotResult
runOneShotExecution handle regAgent convId session0 query = do
    let config = oscConfig handle
    let node = regNode regAgent
    let tree = regTree regAgent
    let agentCfg = AgentTree.osNodeConfig node
    let apiKeys = [] -- TODO: Get from tree/props

    -- Get API key
    let mApiKey = lookupApiKey (AgentTree.apiKeyId agentCfg) apiKeys

    -- Create HTTP runtime
    httpRuntime <- case mApiKey of
        Just apiKey -> HttpClient.newRuntime (HttpClient.BearerToken $ Text.decodeUtf8 $ OpenAI.revealApiKey apiKey)
        Nothing -> HttpClient.newRuntime HttpClient.NoToken

    -- Create completion config
    let completionConfig =
            OpenAICompletionConfig
                { cfgTracer = Tracer $ \_ -> pure () -- silent
                , cfgRuntime = httpRuntime
                , cfgBaseUrl = OpenAI.ApiBaseUrl $ AgentTree.modelUrl agentCfg
                , cfgModelName = AgentTree.modelName agentCfg
                , cfgModelFlavor = parseModelFlavor $ AgentTree.flavor agentCfg
                }

    let completeF = mkOpenAICompletion completionConfig

    -- Read tools from TVar
    tools <- readTVarIO (AgentTree.osNodeTools node)
    let systemTools = map toolRegistrationToSystemTool tools

    let tp = ToolPortal.makeToolPortal (Tracer $ \_ -> pure ()) (AgentTree.osNodeTools node)

    -- Create agent
    let agent =
            Agent
                { step = naiveTilNoToolCallStep
                , sysPrompt = pure $ SystemPrompt $ Text.unlines $ AgentTree.systemPrompt agentCfg
                , sysTools = pure systemTools
                , usrQuery = pure $ Just $ UserQuery query
                , toolCall = executeLlmToolCall (Tracer $ \_ -> pure ()) (readTVarIO $ AgentTree.osNodeTools node) (SessionCompat.parseToolCallFromLlmToolCall, SessionCompat.callResultToUserToolResponse)
                , toolPortal = tp
                , complete = completeF
                , contextConfig = defaultContextConfig
                }

    -- Run agent with error handling
    result <- try $ do
        -- Notify session started
        handleSessionProgress handle convId (SessionStarted session0)

        -- Run conversation
        (llmTurn, finalSession) <- run convId agent session0

        -- Output thinking if enabled
        let thinking = llmTurn.llmResponse.responseThinking
        when (oscEnableThinking config) $
            case thinking of
                Just t -> TextIO.hPutStrLn stderr t
                Nothing -> pure ()

        -- Notify session completed
        handleSessionProgress handle convId (SessionCompleted finalSession)

        -- Persist session
        persistSession handle convId finalSession

        pure $
            OneShotResult
                { osrText = extractResponseText llmTurn.llmResponse
                , osrThinking = thinking
                , osrSession = Just finalSession
                , osrSuccess = True
                , osrError = Nothing
                , osrExecutionTime = Nothing
                }

    case result of
        Left (e :: SomeException) -> do
            let errMsg = Text.pack $ show e
            handleSessionProgress handle convId (SessionFailed session0 errMsg)
            pure $
                OneShotResult
                    { osrText = ""
                    , osrThinking = Nothing
                    , osrSession = Just session0
                    , osrSuccess = False
                    , osrError = Just errMsg
                    , osrExecutionTime = Nothing
                    }
        Right r -> pure r

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Session Management
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-- | Handle session progress.
handleSessionProgress :: OneShotInterfaceHandle -> ConversationId -> SessionProgress -> IO ()
handleSessionProgress handle convId progress = do
    let config = oscConfig handle

    -- Call custom callback if set
    case config.oscPersistence of
        Persistence_Custom callback -> do
            let session = case progress of
                    SessionStarted s -> s
                    SessionUpdated s -> s
                    SessionCompleted s -> s
                    SessionFailed s _ -> s
            callback convId session
        _ -> pure ()

    -- Persist to SQLite if configured
    case oscPersistenceHandle handle of
        Just ph -> do
            let session = case progress of
                    SessionStarted s -> s
                    SessionUpdated s -> s
                    SessionCompleted s -> s
                    SessionFailed s _ -> s
            OSPersistence.storeSession ph convId session
        Nothing -> pure ()

-- | Persist session based on configuration.
persistSession :: OneShotInterfaceHandle -> ConversationId -> Session -> IO ()
persistSession handle convId session = do
    let config = oscConfig handle
    let tracer = oscTracer config

    case config.oscPersistence of
        Persistence_None -> pure ()
        Persistence_SessionStore store ->
            SessionStore.storeSession store convId session
        Persistence_FilePath path ->
            SessionStore.writeSessionToFile path session
        Persistence_Sqlite _ -> do
            -- Handled by persistence handle
            pure ()
        Persistence_Both store path -> do
            SessionStore.storeSession store convId session
            SessionStore.writeSessionToFile path session

    tracer.emit $ OneShotTrace_SessionPersisted convId

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Utility Functions
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-- | Convert AgentId to EntityId.
agentIdToEntityId :: AgentId -> OS.EntityId
agentIdToEntityId (AgentId uuid) = OS.EntityId uuid

-- | Look up API key by ID.
lookupApiKey :: Text -> AgentTree.LoadedApiKeys -> Maybe OpenAI.ApiKey
lookupApiKey keyId keys = fmap snd $ Prelude.find ((== keyId) . fst) keys

-- | Parse model flavor from text.
parseModelFlavor :: Text -> OpenAI.ModelFlavor
parseModelFlavor txt = fromMaybe OpenAI.OpenAIv1 $ OpenAI.parseFlavor txt

-- | Convert ToolRegistration to SystemTool.
toolRegistrationToSystemTool :: ToolRegistration -> SessionTypes.SystemTool
toolRegistrationToSystemTool reg =
    let llmTool = reg.declareTool
        toolDef =
            SessionTypes.SystemToolDefinitionV1
                { name = llmTool.toolDescriptionName.getToolName
                , llmName = llmTool.toolDescriptionName.getToolName
                , description = llmTool.toolDescriptionText
                , properties = llmTool.toolDescriptionParamProperties
                , raw =
                    Aeson.object
                        [ "type" Aeson..= ("function" :: Text)
                        , "function"
                            Aeson..= Aeson.object
                                [ "name" Aeson..= llmTool.toolDescriptionName.getToolName
                                , "description" Aeson..= llmTool.toolDescriptionText
                                , "parameters" Aeson..= toolParamsToJson llmTool.toolDescriptionParamProperties
                                ]
                        ]
                }
     in SessionTypes.SystemTool $ SessionTypes.V1 toolDef

-- | Convert tool parameters to JSON schema.
toolParamsToJson :: [ParamProperty] -> Aeson.Value
toolParamsToJson props =
    Aeson.object
        [ "type" Aeson..= ("object" :: Text)
        , "properties"
            Aeson..= Aeson.fromList (map paramPropertyToJson props)
        , "required" Aeson..= map propertyKey (filter propertyRequired props)
        , "additionalProperties" Aeson..= False
        ]
  where
    paramPropertyToJson p =
        ( AesonKey.fromText $ propertyKey p
        , paramTypeToJson p
        )
    paramTypeToJson p =
        Aeson.object $
            [ "type" Aeson..= paramTypeToString (propertyType p)
            , "description" Aeson..= propertyDescription p
            ]
                ++ case propertyType p of
                    EnumParamType enumVals -> ["enum" Aeson..= enumVals]
                    _ -> []

    paramTypeToString :: ParamType -> Text
    paramTypeToString NullParamType = "null"
    paramTypeToString StringParamType = "string"
    paramTypeToString BoolParamType = "boolean"
    paramTypeToString NumberParamType = "number"
    paramTypeToString (EnumParamType _) = "string"
    paramTypeToString (OpaqueParamType t) = t
    paramTypeToString (MultipleParamType t) = t
    paramTypeToString (ObjectParamType _) = "object"

-- | Extract response text from LLM response.
extractResponseText :: LlmResponse -> Text
extractResponseText (LlmResponse mtxt _ _ _) = fromMaybe "" mtxt
